letter.title: [Letter] 64th Record: App Optimization Progress
letter.content: An energy-saving mode that reduces battery consumption by 15% will be applied in the next patch.

letter.title: [Letter] 63rd Record: OST Production Behind Story
letter.content: Revealing the recording scene of our main theme song 'Tears of Reunion', collaborated with a famous orchestra.

letter.title: [Letter] 62nd Record: Traveler Support Campaign
letter.content: To help you experience a wider world, we are temporarily making world map warp costs free.

letter.title: [Letter] 61st Record: Guild War Balance Adjustment
letter.content: We have slightly increased the attack power of siege weapons to mitigate the overwhelming advantage of the defending side.

letter.title: [Letter] 60th Record: Milestone of Sixty
letter.content: The number 60 carries great weight. Tear Studio will continue to work hard without losing our initial resolution.

letter.title: [Letter] 59th Record: Bulk Enhancement System
letter.content: We have finally completed development of the bulk equipment enhancement feature requested by many players.

letter.title: [Letter] 58th Record: Earth Day Campaign
letter.content: Complete the in-game trash collection quest to earn the special 'Blue Earth' title.

letter.title: [Letter] 57th Record: Hardware Acceleration Option
letter.content: We have added a hardware acceleration option to maximize the performance of your latest GPU.

letter.title: [Letter] 56th Record: Awareness Campaign
letter.content: We are conducting a small but meaningful donation event to build a better world together.

letter.title: [Letter] 55th Record: Cherry Blossom Festival Ends
letter.content: The beautiful cherry blossom season is ending. Please make sure to exchange your collected petals within the period.

letter.title: [Letter] 54th Record: New Class Teasing
letter.content: The Spellsword, a charming class that masters both sword and magic, is coming to you very soon.

letter.title: [Letter] 53rd Record: Security System Enhancement
letter.content: We are diversifying two-factor authentication methods to fundamentally prevent the risk of account theft.

letter.title: [Letter] 52nd Record: Silent Day of Remembrance
letter.content: We hope you enjoy the game in a calm and quiet atmosphere today.

letter.title: [Letter] 51st Record: Your Valuable Vote
letter.content: Exercise your valuable right to vote. A small commemorative gift will be given upon verifying your participation.

letter.title: [Letter] 50th Record: Halfway Success
letter.content: Celebrating our 50th record, we have sent a Legendary Grade Guaranteed Ticket to all players.

letter.title: [Letter] 49th Record: Black Day Special Event
letter.content: It is okay to be alone! Eat Jajangmyeon in-game to receive a useful attack power buff.

letter.title: [Letter] 48th Record: Text Readability Improvement
letter.content: To reduce eye fatigue, we have replaced the system font with a high-resolution pixel font.

letter.title: [Letter] 47th Record: Weekend Gold Dungeon
letter.content: An opportunity to stock up on gold! The number of weekend gold dungeon entries will be increased.

letter.title: [Letter] 46th Record: Chat Input Issue Fixed
letter.content: Resolved an issue where the keyboard would suddenly disappear when typing chat on certain devices.

letter.title: [Letter] 45th Record: Welcoming New Friends
letter.content: The influx of new users is increasing. We kindly ask for your warm guidance and support.

letter.title: [Letter] 44th Record: Dismantle Efficiency Boost
letter.content: We have doubled the amount of Magic Essence obtained when dismantling highly enhanced equipment.

letter.title: [Letter] 43rd Record: World Health Day Discount
letter.content: Wishing you good health! All recovery potions in the shop will be sold at a 50% discount.

letter.title: [Letter] 42nd Record: Energetic Monday
letter.content: Thank you for starting your week with us. Here is a small energy drink reward for everyone.

letter.title: [Letter] 41st Record: Arbor Day Tree Planting
letter.content: Protect the environment in the virtual world too! Plant a tree and earn unique rewards.

letter.title: [Letter] 40th Record: Memories of 40 Floors
letter.content: Celebrating our 40th day together, we are revealing a special coupon code to show our gratitude.

letter.title: [Letter] 39th Record: Guild Warehouse Expansion
letter.content: We have expanded warehouse slots to allow guilds to manage assets more efficiently.

letter.title: [Letter] 38th Record: Server Stability Report
letter.content: We analyzed recent connection delays and have expanded our server hardware capacity.

letter.title: [Letter] 37th Record: April Fool's Prank
letter.content: For today only, operators' names will change into cute monsters. Do not be surprised!

letter.title: [Letter] 36th Record: Wrapping up March
letter.content: As we wrap up March filled with warm spring vibes, we would like to share our plans for April.

letter.title: [Letter] 35th Record: Chat Filter Update
letter.content: To maintain a pleasant community, we have upgraded our profanity and abuse filter system.

letter.title: [Letter] 34th Record: Weekend Connection Rewards
letter.content: Connect this weekend to receive three additional enhancement stone pouches.

letter.title: [Letter] 33rd Record: Preparing Global Expansion
letter.content: We are expanding our language support features to meet users from a wider world.

contents.title: [Content] 64th Update: Mini-Game Introduced
contents.content: A highly addictive mini-game 'Tear Pang-Pang', matching and popping same-colored marbles, has been added.

contents.title: [Content] 63rd Update: Ancient Rune Engraving
contents.content: The 'Ancient Rune' system, allowing players to imbue weapons with powerful magic, has been updated.

contents.title: [Content] 62nd Update: Earth Golem Raid
contents.content: A colossal golem has emerged in the rocky mountains. Break through its formidable defense!

contents.title: [Content] 61st Update: Guild Occupation Battle
contents.content: Every Saturday night, a guild war begins to claim the supreme territories.

contents.title: [Content] 60th Update: Chamber of Trials Opened
contents.content: The Chamber of Trials, where deadly traps await on every floor, is now open.

contents.title: [Content] 59th Update: Pet Expedition Team
contents.content: Send your sleeping pets on expeditions to gather valuable crafting materials.

contents.title: [Content] 58th Update: Eco-Purification Dungeon
contents.content: Purify the polluted forests and earn the blessing buffs of the forest spirits.

contents.title: [Content] 57th Update: Pegasus Evolution
contents.content: An ordinary horse can now receive divine energy to evolve into a flying Pegasus.

contents.title: [Content] 56th Update: Anonymous Mailbox
contents.content: Send an anonymous letter to someone. You might receive a surprising reward.

contents.title: [Content] 55th Update: Cherry Blossom Ending Shop
contents.content: A special shop has opened where you can purchase Legendary rewards using remaining cherry blossom points.

contents.title: [Content] 54th Update: Fractured Land Episode
contents.content: Explore mysterious caverns hidden deep within cracks formed by earthquakes.

contents.title: [Content] 53rd Update: Summon Skill Customization
contents.content: You can now select and enhance specific skills used by your summons based on your preference.

contents.title: [Content] 52nd Update: Quiet Meditation Forest
contents.content: A peaceful forest where experience points accumulate simply by resting without combat.

contents.title: [Content] 51st Update: Voting Emblem Reward
contents.content: A dedicated commemorative emblem will be given to all adventurers who exercised their right.

contents.title: [Content] 50th Update: Rebellion of Black Noodles
contents.content: Help the chef who ran away gather Jajangmyeon ingredients and obtain limited costumes.

contents.title: [Content] 49th Update: Equipment Set Effects
contents.content: A new system has been added where equipping gear from the same series activates special stat boosts.

contents.title: [Content] 48th Update: Jewel Storage Room
contents.content: A new dungeon where players can acquire large quantities of gems needed for gear engraving.

contents.title: [Content] 47th Update: Fishing Tournament
contents.content: The player who catches the largest fish will have their name posted in the town square for a week.

contents.title: [Content] 46th Update: Heroic Crafting Recipes
contents.content: Five new recipes have been added, allowing players to gather materials and craft powerful heroic gear.

contents.title: [Content] 45th Update: Misty Port Expedition
contents.content: Set sail to the port city to find treasures hidden by pirates deep inside the heavy fog.

contents.title: [Content] 44th Update: Bag Cleanup Butler
contents.content: A convenient feature that automatically sells or dismantles items below a set tier has been added.

contents.title: [Content] 43rd Update: Cooking System
contents.content: Cook various dishes using gathered ingredients to temporarily boost your stats.

contents.title: [Content] 42nd Update: Weekly Quest System
contents.content: Complete difficult weekly missions to earn large amounts of valuable progression rewards.

contents.title: [Content] 41st Update: Sapling Care Campaign
contents.content: Plant a sapling in your personal garden, take care of it, and harvest rare fruits.

contents.title: [Content] 40th Update: 40-Player Battle Royale
contents.content: An exciting survival mode has been added, fighting until only one final survivor remains.

contents.title: [Content] 39th Update: Rare Mount 'Griffin'
contents.content: The legendary Griffin, flying freely across sky and land, has been released as a new mount.

contents.title: [Content] 38th Update: Time Attack Dungeon
contents.content: Defeat the boss in the shortest time, record your rank, and claim honorable rewards.

contents.title: [Content] 37th Update: Colossal Slime Raid
contents.content: Defeat the colossal slime that appeared in the town center on April Fool's to receive costumes.

contents.title: [Content] 36th Update: PVP Season 1 Rewards
contents.content: The first official season has ended. Special cosmetic wings are awarded based on your final rank.

contents.title: [Content] 35th Update: Relic Awakening System
contents.content: Awaken sleeping ancient relics to permanently increase your character's basic attributes.

contents.title: [Content] 34th Update: Secret Shop Opens
contents.content: A traveling merchant appearing only at specific hours will sell extremely rare enhancement materials.

contents.title: [Content] 33rd Update: Treasure Map Hunt
contents.content: Gather fragments dropped from hunting to complete the map and locate the hidden vaults.

fixes.title: [Patch] 64th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed an issue where skill cooldowns would not reset correctly during network latency.

fixes.title: [Patch] 63rd Patch Correction
fixes.content: Resolved a problem where materials were abnormally consumed during rune engraving.

fixes.title: [Patch] 62nd Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed an issue where field boss spawn notification messages were not output.

fixes.title: [Patch] 61st Patch Correction
fixes.content: Adjusted excessive castle gate destruction visual effects during occupation battles.

fixes.title: [Patch] 60th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a terrain collider bug where monsters could get stuck on specific floors of trials.

fixes.title: [Patch] 59th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed an error where inventory space shortage caused crashes when receiving pet expedition rewards.

fixes.title: [Patch] 58th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a bug where poison mist damage inside the purification dungeon bypassed character defense.

fixes.title: [Patch] 57th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Resolved a render issue where characters became invisible at specific altitudes while flying on Pegasus.

fixes.title: [Patch] 56th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Blocked a exploit where anonymous mailbox reward items could be claimed multiple times.

fixes.title: [Patch] 55th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a display error where the item list of the cherry blossom point shop did not refresh.

fixes.title: [Patch] 54th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Visually clarified the range of instant-kill mechanics among the patterns of the caverns boss.

fixes.title: [Patch] 53rd Patch Correction
fixes.content: Improved summon AI behavior where they would occasionally stop moving and fail to target monsters.

fixes.title: [Patch] 52nd Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a bug where changing channels during meditation reset accumulated experience points.

fixes.title: [Patch] 51st Patch Correction
fixes.content: Resolved an issue where entering the voting event page occasionally resulted in a white screen.

fixes.title: [Patch] 50th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed physics collision bugs with the event chef costume to reduce awkward animations.

fixes.title: [Patch] 49th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Corrected incorrectly stated stat boost values in the equipment set effect tooltip.

fixes.title: [Patch] 48th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a chronic loading issue where the loading bar stuck at 99% upon entering the jewel room.

fixes.title: [Patch] 47th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Adjusted the fishing bobber bite sound effects to prevent them from being drowned out by background noise.

fixes.title: [Patch] 46th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Downscaled the required quantity of alchemy powder for crafting heroic gear to a realistic level.

fixes.title: [Patch] 45th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a sound loop error where the misty port background music cut off awkwardly while looping.

fixes.title: [Patch] 44th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Resolved a critical bug where the bag cleanup butler dismantled locked equipment items.

fixes.title: [Patch] 43rd Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed an issue where cooking proficiency did not increase, and solved specific recipe crafting blocks.

fixes.title: [Patch] 42nd Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a bug where weekly quest counts failed to reset or were counted double.

fixes.title: [Patch] 41st Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed an issue where the watering interaction on saplings was not touchable in mobile environments.

fixes.title: [Patch] 40th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Improved spectator mode UI where specific buttons blocked the screen while spectating.

fixes.title: [Patch] 39th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed animation glitches where mount motions got tangled when using attack skills on a Griffin.

fixes.title: [Patch] 38th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Resolved a bug where millisecond values were omitted from the time attack ranking calculation.

fixes.title: [Patch] 37th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed an issue where event chests dropped after defeating the colossal slime fell through the floor.

fixes.title: [Patch] 36th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a display error where previous season data was output when claiming PVP rewards.

fixes.title: [Patch] 35th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Resolved a stat value mismatch where gold consumed for relic enhancement differed from the warning window.

fixes.title: [Patch] 34th Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a bug where secret shop item prices did not apply the discount rates.

fixes.title: [Patch] 33rd Patch Correction
fixes.content: Fixed a mapping error where treasure map location hints differed from their actual coordinate locations.
